```{r}
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "mTSCLC_expression_Wnt6_Lrp2_Egfr.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# Define the three genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tac2"
gene2 <- "Muc16"
gene3 <- "Ppbp"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("mTSCLC_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all three genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the three genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) + coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb_expression.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.05 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "mTSCLC_expression_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)
```

```{r}

#keep in case i want to check later 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tfrc"
gene2 <- "Dio3"
gene3 <- "Hbegf"
gene4 <- "Glis1"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 &
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                                     levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]
# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis:", 
                     round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot as PNG
png_filename <- paste0("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_", gene4, "_Expression.png")
ggsave(filename = png_filename,
       plot = p, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 6, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300,
       device = "png")

# Print the plot
print(p)


# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()
```
```{r}
#keep in case i want to check later - EPC markers?

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tpbpa"
gene2 <- "Hand1"
gene3 <- "Tfap2c"
gene4 <- "Gjb3"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("mTSCLC_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 &
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                                     levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_", gene4, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```

```{r}

# Define the genes of interest in the desired order
genes <- c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Tfap2c","Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2","Cited1","Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9","Gbj5","Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Bmp2","Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1","Inhbb", "Pcdh12", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8","Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1","Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2", "Nanog", "Pou3f1", "Pou5f1","Klf4", "Otx2", "Sox2")

# Function to create and save feature plots
create_feature_plot <- function(seurat_obj, feature, filename) {
  if (feature %in% rownames(seurat_obj)) {
    p <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = feature, 
                     reduction = "umap", order = TRUE) +
      scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("lightgrey", "purple")) +
      ggtitle(feature) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))+
  coord_fixed()
    
    ggsave(filename, p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    return(p)
  } else {
    message(paste("Gene", feature, "not found in the dataset."))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Create individual feature plots
all_markers <- unique(unlist(genes))
feature_plots_list <- list()
for (marker in all_markers) {
  filename <- paste0("featureplot_", make.names(marker), ".png")
  p <- create_feature_plot(cells.combined.p12, marker, filename)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    feature_plots_list[[marker]] <- p
  }
}

```
```{r}
# Define the gene of interest
gene1 <- "Postn"

# Get gene expression data for the gene of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing the gene
cells_expressing <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0)

# Identify cells not expressing the gene
cells_not_expressing <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing] <- paste(gene1, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                             levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               
  ) + 
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "Expression\n",
                    "Percent expressing ", gene1, ": ", 
                    round(length(cells_expressing) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%", 
                    sep = "")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata for the expressing cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing))

# Save the conditions result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, 
          paste0("mTSCLC_", gene1, "_expression_conditions.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing))

# Save the clusters result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, 
          paste0("mTSCLC_", gene1, "_expression_clusters.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
save(cells.combined.p12, file="cells.combined_mTSCLC_p12.rdata")
```
```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#

```

```{r}

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Nanog"
gene2 <- "Pou5f1"
gene3 <- "Sox2"
gene4 <- "Otx2"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

p3 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene3,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene3) +
  coord_fixed()

p4 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene4,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene4) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots horizontally using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Core Pluripotency and Early Differentiation Markers Expression Levels in UMAP",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_Pluripotency_Markers_Expression_Levels.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,    # Increased width to accommodate 4 plots side by side
  height = 5,    # Reduced height since we're using a single row
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Nanog_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Pou5f1_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)],
    Sox2_exp = gene_expression[gene3, rownames(.)],
    Otx2_exp = gene_expression[gene4, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Nanog = mean(Nanog_exp),
    mean_Pou5f1 = mean(Pou5f1_exp),
    mean_Sox2 = mean(Sox2_exp),
    mean_Otx2 = mean(Otx2_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Nanog + mean_Pou5f1 + mean_Sox2 + mean_Otx2))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "D0D4_Pluripotency_Markers_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Gata4"
gene2 <- "Gata6"
gene3 <- "Pitx2"
gene4 <- "Postn"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

p3 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene3,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene3) +
  coord_fixed()

p4 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene4,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene4) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots horizontally using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Cardiac Development Markers Expression Levels in UMAP",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_Cardiac_Markers_Expression_Levels.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,    # Increased width to accommodate 4 plots side by side
  height = 5,    # Reduced height since we're using a single row
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Gata4_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Gata6_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)],
    Pitx2_exp = gene_expression[gene3, rownames(.)],
    Postn_exp = gene_expression[gene4, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Gata4 = mean(Gata4_exp),
    mean_Gata6 = mean(Gata6_exp),
    mean_Pitx2 = mean(Pitx2_exp),
    mean_Postn = mean(Postn_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Gata4 + mean_Gata6 + mean_Pitx2 + mean_Postn))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "P12_Cardiac_Markers_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the two genes of interest
gene1 <- "Krt18"
gene2 <- "Krt8"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots horizontally using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Keratin Expression Levels in UMAP",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_Keratin_Expression_Levels.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 12,    # Adjusted width for two plots
  height = 5,    # Maintained height
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Krt18_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Krt8_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Krt18 = mean(Krt18_exp),
    mean_Krt8 = mean(Krt8_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Krt18 + mean_Krt8))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "P12_Keratin_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Gata3"
gene2 <- "Eomes"
gene3 <- "Cdx2"
gene4 <- "Elf5"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

p3 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene3,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene3) +
  coord_fixed()

p4 <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                  features = gene4,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene4) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots horizontally using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Trophoblast Lineage Markers Expression Levels in UMAP",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_Trophoblast_Markers_Expression_Levels.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,    # Width for four plots
  height = 5,    # Maintained height
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Gata3_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Eomes_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)],
    Cdx2_exp = gene_expression[gene3, rownames(.)],
    Elf5_exp = gene_expression[gene4, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Gata3 = mean(Gata3_exp),
    mean_Eomes = mean(Eomes_exp),
    mean_Cdx2 = mean(Cdx2_exp),
    mean_Elf5 = mean(Elf5_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Gata3 + mean_Eomes + mean_Cdx2 + mean_Elf5))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "P12_Trophoblast_Markers_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```
```{r}
# Load required libraries
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(ggplot2)

# Function to find DEGs for trophoblast population
find_trophoblast_degs <- function(seurat_obj, trophoblast_clusters, n_genes = 100) {
  # Create a new identity column for trophoblast vs rest comparison
  seurat_obj$group <- ifelse(
    seurat_obj$SCT_snn_res.0.6 %in% trophoblast_clusters, 
    "Trophoblast",
    "Other"
  )
  
  # Find DEGs
  Idents(seurat_obj) <- "group"
  degs <- FindMarkers(
    seurat_obj,
    ident.1 = "Trophoblast",
    ident.2 = "Other",
    min.pct = 0.25,
    only.pos = TRUE  # Only get genes upregulated in trophoblasts
  )
  
  # Sort by avg_log2FC and get top genes
  degs <- degs[order(-degs$avg_log2FC), ]
  top_degs <- head(degs, n_genes)
  
  return(list(
    all_degs = degs,
    top_degs = top_degs
  ))
}

# Function to perform GO analysis
run_go_analysis <- function(gene_list, output_prefix) {
  # Convert gene symbols to ENTREZ IDs
  entrez_ids <- mapIds(
    org.Mm.eg.db,
    keys = gene_list,
    keytype = "SYMBOL",
    column = "ENTREZID"
  )
  
  # Run GO enrichment analysis
  go_results <- enrichGO(
    gene = entrez_ids[!is.na(entrez_ids)],
    OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
    ont = "BP",
    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
    pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
    qvalueCutoff = 0.2
  )
  
  # Save results to CSV
  go_df <- as.data.frame(go_results)
  write.csv(go_df, file = paste0(output_prefix, "_GO_results.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
  
  # Create visualization
  plot <- barplot(go_results,
    showCategory = 15,
    title = "Top GO Terms - Trophoblast Markers",
    font.size = 8
  )
  
  ggsave(
    paste0(output_prefix, "_GO_plot.png"),
    plot,
    width = 10,
    height = 8
  )
  
  return(go_results)
}

# Main analysis function
analyze_trophoblast_population <- function(seurat_obj) {
  # Define trophoblast clusters
  trophoblast_clusters <- c(2, 4, 6, 7)
  
  # Find DEGs
  deg_results <- find_trophoblast_degs(
    seurat_obj,
    trophoblast_clusters,
    n_genes = 100
  )
  
  # Save DEG results
  write.csv(
    deg_results$all_degs,
    "all_DEGs_trophoblast.csv",
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  write.csv(
    deg_results$top_degs,
    "top100_DEGs_trophoblast.csv",
    row.names = TRUE
  )
  
  # Run GO analysis on top DEGs
  go_results <- run_go_analysis(
    rownames(deg_results$top_degs),
    "trophoblast_markers"
  )
  
  return(list(
    deg_results = deg_results,
    go_results = go_results
  ))
}

# Run the analysis
results <- analyze_trophoblast_population(cells.combined.p12)
```

```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
```

```{r}
# Subset the Seurat object to keep only clusters 2, 4, 6, and 7
clusters_of_interest <- c("2", "4", "6", "7")
subset_p12 <- subset(x = cells.combined.p12, 
                    subset = SCT_snn_res.0.6 %in% clusters_of_interest)  

# Verify the subsetting worked
table(Idents(subset_p12))

# Normalize and scale the data (if not already done)
subset_p12 <- NormalizeData(subset_p12)
subset_p12 <- ScaleData(subset_p12)

# Run PCA
subset_p12 <- RunPCA(subset_p12)

# Run UMAP on the subset
subset_p12 <- RunUMAP(subset_p12, dims = 1:20)

# Create visualization of the subset using your previous color scheme
color_palette_subset <- c(
  "#DC143C",  # Cluster 2 - Crimson
  "#4B0082",  # Cluster 4 - Indigo
  "#4682B4",  # Cluster 6 - Steel Blue
  "#008080"   # Cluster 7 - Teal
)

# Create the DimPlot
p_subset <- DimPlot(subset_p12, 
                    reduction = "umap", 
                    label = TRUE, 
                    label.size = 4, 
                    repel = TRUE,
                    cols = color_palette_subset) +
  ggtitle("Late Passage mTSCLC - Clusters 2,4,6,7") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(filename = "mTSCLC_p12_subset_2467.png", 
       plot = p_subset, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 6, 
       dpi = 300)

# Find markers for each cluster in the subset
markers_subset_p12 <- FindAllMarkers(subset_p12,
                                   only.pos = TRUE,
                                   min.pct = 0.25,
                                   logfc.threshold = 0.25)

# View top markers for each cluster
top_markers_p12 <- markers_subset_p12 %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(n = 10, order_by = avg_log2FC)

# Print the top markers
print(top_markers_p12)

# Optionally, save the markers to a CSV file
write.csv(markers_subset_p12, "markers_subset_p12_clusters_2467.csv")
```
```{r}
# Install required packages if not already installed
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(c("clusterProfiler", "org.Mm.eg.db"))

# Install enrichR from CRAN
install.packages("enrichR")

# Now load all required libraries
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(enrichR)
library(pheatmap)

# 1. Visualize key trophoblast genes
trophoblast_genes <- c("Krt18", "Krt8", "Gata3", "Cdx2", "Elf5", 
                      # Additional trophoblast markers
                      "Eomes", "Esrrb", "Hand1", "Gcm1", "Ascl2", 
                      "Prl3d1", "Tpbpa", "Prl2c2", "Gjb3", "Syna", "Synb",
                      "Cebpa", "Tfap2c", "Mash2")

# Feature plots for key genes
feature_plots <- FeaturePlot(subset_p12, 
                            features = trophoblast_genes,
                            ncol = 4,
                            order = TRUE,
                            min.cutoff = 'q10',
                            max.cutoff = 'q90')
ggsave("trophoblast_markers_featureplot.png", feature_plots, width = 20, height = 25)

# Violin plots for the same genes
violin_plots <- VlnPlot(subset_p12, 
                        features = trophoblast_genes,
                        ncol = 4,
                        pt.size = 0)
ggsave("trophoblast_markers_violin.png", violin_plots, width = 20, height = 25)

# 2. Compare expression between clusters
# Calculate average expression for each cluster
avg_exp <- AverageExpression(subset_p12, features = trophoblast_genes)$RNA
# Create heatmap of relative expression
pheatmap(scale(avg_exp),
         main = "Scaled Expression of Trophoblast Markers",
         fontsize_row = 10,
         fontsize_col = 10,
         filename = "trophoblast_markers_heatmap.png",
         width = 8,
         height = 10)

# 3. Pathway Analysis
# Get differentially expressed genes for each cluster
markers_all <- FindAllMarkers(subset_p12, 
                             only.pos = TRUE,
                             min.pct = 0.25,
                             logfc.threshold = 0.25)

# Convert gene symbols to Entrez IDs for pathway analysis
clusters_entrez <- lapply(split(markers_all, markers_all$cluster), function(x) {
    bitr(x$gene, fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db)$ENTREZID
})

# Run GO enrichment for each cluster
go_results <- lapply(clusters_entrez, function(genes) {
    enrichGO(gene = genes,
             OrgDb = org.Mm.eg.db,
             ont = "BP",
             pAdjustMethod = "BH",
             pvalueCutoff = 0.05)
})

# Save GO results
for(i in names(go_results)) {
    write.csv(as.data.frame(go_results[[i]]), 
              file = paste0("GO_enrichment_cluster_", i, ".csv"))
}
```


```{r}
# Find variable features
subset_p12 <- FindVariableFeatures(subset_p12, nfeatures = 4000)
variable_genes <- VariableFeatures(subset_p12)

# Convert to matrix explicitly
var_expr <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(subset_p12, slot = "data")[variable_genes, ])

# Check the data structure
print(dim(var_expr))
print(class(var_expr))

# Calculate correlation matrix
gene_cor <- cor(t(as.matrix(var_expr)))

# Perform hierarchical clustering
gene_clusters <- hclust(as.dist(1 - gene_cor))
modules <- cutree(gene_clusters, k = 6)  # Split into 6 modules

# Create module score for each cell
for(i in unique(modules)) {
    module_genes <- names(modules)[modules == i]
    subset_p12 <- AddModuleScore(subset_p12, 
                                features = list(module_genes),
                                name = paste0("Module_", i))
}

# Visualize module scores
module_scores <- grep("Module_", colnames(subset_p12@meta.data), value = TRUE)
module_plots <- FeaturePlot(subset_p12, 
                           features = module_scores,
                           ncol = 3,
                           reduction = "umap")

# Save the plot
ggsave("gene_modules_umap.png", module_plots, width = 15, height = 15)

# Create a dataframe of genes in each module
module_list <- lapply(unique(modules), function(i) {
    names(modules)[modules == i]
})
names(module_list) <- paste0("Module_", unique(modules))

# Save the module gene lists
module_genes_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(module_list), function(module) {
    data.frame(
        Module = module,
        Genes = paste(module_list[[module]], collapse = ", ")
    )
}))
write.csv(module_genes_df, "module_gene_lists.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
```{r}
# First, install required dependencies
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

# Install dependencies from Bioconductor
BiocManager::install(c("ComplexHeatmap", "circlize", "NMF"))

# Install dependencies from CRAN
install.packages(c("yaml", "htmlwidgets", "markdown", "rmarkdown", "devtools"))

# Install CellChat from GitHub
devtools::install_github("sqjin/CellChat")
```

```{r}
save(subset_p12, file="cells.combined_mTSCLC_p12_subset.rdata")
```

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(Seurat)
library(CellChat)
library(patchwork)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Get data using current Seurat methods
data.input <- as.matrix(GetAssayData(subset_p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data"))
meta.data <- subset_p12@meta.data

# Clean up the factor levels in metadata
meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 <- droplevels(as.factor(meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6))

# Verify the levels
print("Checking factor levels:")
print(levels(meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6))

# Create CellChat object with cleaned metadata
cellchat <- createCellChat(object = data.input, meta = meta.data, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")

# Set the ligand-receptor database
CellChatDB <- CellChatDB.mouse
showDatabaseCategory(CellChatDB)
CellChatDB.use <- CellChatDB
cellchat@DB <- CellChatDB.use

# Pre-process the expression data
cellchat <- subsetData(cellchat)
cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat)
cellchat <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat)

# Verify cell groups before computing probabilities
print("Checking cell groups:")
print(unique(cellchat@idents))

# Compute the communication probability/weight
cellchat <- computeCommunProb(cellchat)

# Calculate the aggregated cell-cell communication network
cellchat <- aggregateNet(cellchat)

# Visualization
png("number_interactions.png", width = 800, height = 800)
groupSize <- as.numeric(table(cellchat@idents))
netVisual_circle(cellchat@net$count, 
                 vertex.weight = groupSize, 
                 weight.scale = T, 
                 label.edge= F, 
                 title.name = "Number of Interactions")
dev.off()

# Save the CellChat object
saveRDS(cellchat, file = "cellchat_analysis.rds")

# Print a summary of interactions
print("Number of interactions per group:")
print(table(cellchat@idents))
```

```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load the relabeled Seurat object
cells_subset <- cells.combined.p12

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  "Pou5f1", "Utf1", "Pou3f1", "Dnmt3b", "Otx2", "Sox2", 
  "Cdx2", "Gata3", "Pitx2", "Tpbpa", "Tfap2c", "Gata2", "Ascl2", "Elf5"
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Define the custom cluster order
cluster_order <- c("4", "14", "1", "8", "2", "12", "13", "3", "10", "9", "6", "7", "5", "0", "11")

# Reorder the levels of the clustering factor
cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6 <- factor(cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6, levels = cluster_order)

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells_subset, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 20) +  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkblue")) +  # White to light blue to dark blue
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes in the custom order
print("Cluster sizes:")
cluster_sizes <- table(Idents(cells_subset))
print(cluster_sizes[cluster_order])
```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Define gene sets in the order you want them to appear
gene_sets <- list(
  "2i/LIF mESC" = c("Gsc"),
  "serum/LIF mESC" = c("Trh"),
  "E3.5 EPI" = c("Fgf4", "Foxd3", "Cdh3", "Tbc1d9", "Atp1b2"),
    "epiblast/ESC" = c("Mgp"),
    "embryo stromal" = c("Tmeff2"),
  "E3.5 PE" = c("Ror1", "Sh3pxd2b", "Amn", "Lefty1", "Foxa2"),
    "PE" = c("Fam110d", "Rbp7"),
    "endothelial" = c("Bcl11a", "Tfeb"),
  "mXEN" = c("Sox17", "9030622o2rik"),
      "amniotic mesoderm" = c("Col1a2"),
  "E3.5 TE" = c("Tmprss2", "Tacstd2", "Arhgap31", "Mab21l3", "1600002d24rik", "Slc22a5"),
  "mTSC" = c("Elf5", "Fthl17a", "Dhrs9", "Nat8l", "Tmem114"),
  "EPC bipotential progenitor" = c("Rbm20", "Cdh1", "Gm1673", "Fgfbp1"),
  "EPC-derived S-TGC progenitor" = c("Cited1", "Atp6v0d1", "Tial1"),
  "EPC-derived SpT progenitor" = c("Sct", "AA467197", "Mbnl3", "Tpbpa"),
  "Primary P-TGC" = c("Tgm1", "Slc44a4", "Exoc3l4", "Fosl1"),
  "Secondary P-TGC" = c("Col4a1", "Plod2", "Lamb1", "Lamc1", "Fst"),
  "secondary P-TGC precursor" = c("Gjb5", "Birc3", "Slc16a1"),
  "P-TGCs" = c("Camk1d", "Gphn", "Hexb", "Cmss1"),
  "S-TGC" = c("Mmp9"),
  "SpT" = c("Dact1", "Zdhhc1"),
  "SynTII Precursor" = c("Gnao1"),
  "migratory trophoblast" = c("Serpine2", "S100a16", "Pcdh12")
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]

# Create a vector of cell types that matches the genes_present
cell_types_present <- rep(names(gene_sets), sapply(gene_sets, length))[all_genes %in% genes_present]

# Create a data frame for gene annotations, maintaining the original order
gene_df <- data.frame(
  gene = genes_present,
  cell_type = cell_types_present,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Print out any genes that were not found in the dataset
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  cat("The following genes were not found in the dataset:\n")
  print(missing_genes)
}
# Generate a custom color palette for cell types
n_cell_types <- length(unique(gene_df$cell_type))
cell_type_colors <- colorRampPalette(c("#FFF7BC", "#FEC44F", "#EC7014",
                                       "#D0E1F2", "#6BAED6", "#2171B5", "#08306B","#4B0082"))(n_cell_types)
names(cell_type_colors) <- unique(gene_df$cell_type)

# Define the desired order of clusters
cluster_order <- c("4", "14", "1", "8", "2", "12", "13", "3", "10", "9", "6", "7", "5", "0", "11")

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                   features = gene_df$gene,
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 8) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white", "pink", "#8B1A1A"),
                        limits = c(0, NA),
                        oob = scales::squish) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 20), 
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 30, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 150, b = 50, l = 20, unit = "pt")
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Dotplot by Cell Type",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Clusters",
       color = "Average Expression",
       size = "Percent Expressed")

# Add color bar for cell types
dotplot <- dotplot +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1:nrow(gene_df) - 0.5, xmax = 1:nrow(gene_df) + 0.5,
           ymin = -0.6, ymax = -0.1,
           fill = cell_type_colors[gene_df$cell_type], alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-0.7, length(cluster_order) + 0.5),
                  clip = "off")

# Ensure correct gene order
dotplot$data$features.plot <- factor(dotplot$data$features.plot, levels = gene_df$gene)

# Reorder clusters
dotplot$data$id <- factor(dotplot$data$id, levels = cluster_order)

# Save the main plot
ggsave("gene_expression_dotplot_by_cell_type_final.png", dotplot, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 300)

# Get the cell types in the order they were defined
ordered_cell_types <- names(gene_sets)

# Create a data frame for the legend
legend_data <- data.frame(
  cell_type = factor(ordered_cell_types, levels = ordered_cell_types),
  y = seq_along(ordered_cell_types),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Create a separate legend plot for cell types only, in the defined order
legend_plot <- ggplot(legend_data, aes(y = y, x = 1, fill = cell_type)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_type_colors[ordered_cell_types], guide = "none") +
  scale_y_reverse(breaks = seq_along(ordered_cell_types), labels = ordered_cell_types) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 1),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  ) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = seq_along(ordered_cell_types),
           label = ordered_cell_types, hjust = 0, size = 4) +
  labs(title = "Cell Types")

# Save the legend plot
ggsave("cell_type_legend.png", legend_plot, width = 6, height = 8, dpi = 300)

# Display the main plot
print(dotplot)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Assuming cells.combined.p12 is your Seurat object
# and gene_df is your data frame of genes from the previous code

# Extract the expression data for the genes of interest
expr_data <- GetAssayData(cells.combined.p12, slot = "data")[gene_df$gene, ]

# Calculate average expression per cluster
avg_expr <- AverageExpression(cells.combined.p12, features = gene_df$gene, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$SCT

# Scale the data
scaled_avg_expr <- t(scale(t(avg_expr)))

# Create a color palette
col_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100)

ggsave("Scaled_expression_heatmap.png",width = 12, height = 8)
# Create the heatmap
pheatmap(scaled_avg_expr,
         color = col_palette,
         cluster_rows = FALSE,
         cluster_cols = FALSE,
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         annotation_row = data.frame(CellType = gene_df$cell_type, row.names = gene_df$gene),
         main = "Scaled Expression Heatmap",
         fontsize_row = 8,
         fontsize_col = 10)

# Display the plot
print(pheatmap)

ggsave("Scaled_expression_heatmap.png",width = 12, height = 8)

# Print summary statistics
print(summary(as.vector(scaled_avg_expr)))
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(RColorBrewer)

# Load the Seurat object (you'll need to replace this with your actual data loading code)
# cells_subset <- readRDS("path/to/your/seurat/object.rds")

# Define gene sets based on the information in the paragraph
gene_sets <- list(
  "2i/LIF mESC" = c("Gsc"),
  "E3.5 EPI" = c("Fgf4", "Foxd3", "Cdh3", "Tbc1d9"),
  "post-implantation epiblast/ESC" = c("Pou5f1", "Gnao1", "Armcx2"),
  "PE" = c("Ror1", "Sh3pxd2b", "Amn"),
  "TE" = c("Tmprss2", "Tacstd2", "Arhgap31", "Mab21l3", "1600002D24Rik", "Slc22a5"),
  "mTSC" = c("Fthl17a", "Nat8l", "Tmem114", "Dhrs9", "Elf5"),
  "EPC Bipotential progenitor" = c("Rtn1", "Ascl2", "Taco1"),
  "EPC-derived SpT Progenitor" = c("Car2", "Gm2a", "Tpbpa"),
  "Primary P-TGC" = c("Cmtm5", "Ugcg", "Tmem267"),
  "P-TGCs" = c("Slc31a2"),
  "Secondary P-TGC precursors" = c("Hoxc6", "Fbln5"),
  "SpA-TGC" = c("Dact1", "Efcab15", "Zdhhc1"),
  "SynTII precursor" = c("Syna", "Snap91", "D430041D05Rik", "Gm13269", "Fam90a1b.1"),
  "migratory trophoblast" = c("Jaml", "Hpgd"),
  "S-TGC" = c("Exo1"),
  "mXEN" = c("Sox17", "9030622O22Rik"),
  "amniotic mesoderm" = c("Col1a2")
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.xintegrate)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Create a data frame for gene annotations
gene_df <- data.frame(
  gene = genes_present,
  cell_type = sapply(genes_present, function(gene) {
    names(gene_sets)[sapply(gene_sets, function(set) gene %in% set)][1]
  })
)

# Order genes by cell type
gene_df <- gene_df %>% 
  arrange(cell_type, gene)

# Create the enhanced dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.xintegrate,  
                   features = gene_df$gene, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 30,
                   scale.by = "radius") +  # Scale by radius instead of area
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("lightgrey", "pink", "#8B1A1A"),
                        breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2),
                        labels = c("0", "0.5", "1", "1.5", "2+"),
                        limits = c(0, 2)) +
  scale_size(range = c(0, 15), breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 16),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = margin(t = 20)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 20, r = 20, b = 50, l = 20, unit = "pt")
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Clusters",
       size = "Percent Expressed",
       color = "Average Expression")

# Add color bar for cell types
dotplot <- dotplot +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 1:nrow(gene_df) - 0.5, xmax = 1:nrow(gene_df) + 0.5, 
           ymin = -1, ymax = -0.5, 
           fill = colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8, "Set2"))(length(unique(gene_df$cell_type)))[as.factor(gene_df$cell_type)],
           alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, max(as.numeric(as.character(dotplot$data$id))) + 0.5), 
                  clip = "off")

# Add a legend for the color bar
color_bar_legend <- scale_fill_manual(
  name = "Cell Types",
  values = setNames(colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(8, "Set2"))(length(unique(gene_df$cell_type))),
                    unique(gene_df$cell_type)),
  guide = guide_legend(override.aes = list(alpha = 0.8))
)

dotplot <- dotplot + color_bar_legend

# Save the plot
ggsave("gene_expression_dotplot_enhanced.png", dotplot, width = 20, height = 14, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(Idents(cells.combined.xintegrate)))
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load the relabeled Seurat object
cells_subset <- cells.combined.p12

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  "ICM" = c("Sox2", "Nanog", "Fgf4", "Klf4", "Pou5f1", "Esrrb"),
  "PE" = c("Gata6", "Sox17", "Gata4", "Sox7"),
  "TE" = c("Gata3", "Cdx2", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Cdh1", "Tead4")
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Define the desired order of clusters (adjust based on your dataset)
cluster_order <- c("EPI", "PE", "TE")  # Example order for the final labels

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells_subset, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 20) +  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white", "pink", "#8B1A1A")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Pre-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_pre-imp_gene_expression_dotplot.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(Idents(cells_subset)))
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Load the relabeled Seurat object
cells_subset <- cells.combined.p12

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  "ICM" = c("Sox2", "Nanog", "Fgf4", "Klf4", "Pou5f1", "Esrrb"),
  "PE" = c("Gata6", "Sox17", "Gata4", "Sox7"),
  "TE" = c("Gata3", "Cdx2", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Cdh1", "Tead4")
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Define the custom order of clusters
desired_order <- rev(c("0", "9", "3","6", "1","4", "7","5", "8", "2"))

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Reorder the data and remove all NA values
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%  # Remove NA from both clusters and genes
  filter(id %in% desired_order) %>%  # Keep only the desired clusters
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = desired_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Create the dotplot manually
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 20)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white", "pink", "#8B1A1A")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Pre-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types",
       size = "% Expressed",
       color = "Avg Expression")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_pre-imp_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes (excluding NA)
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6[!is.na(cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6)]))

# Print unique values in the id column of the plotted data
print("Clusters in the plot:")
print(unique(reordered_data$id))
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggdendro)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)



# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  "ICM" = c("Sox2", "Nanog", "Fgf4", "Klf4", "Pou5f1", "Esrrb"),
  "PE" = c("Gata6", "Sox17", "Gata4", "Sox7"),
  "TE" = c("Gata3", "Cdx2", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Cdh1", "Tead4")
)


# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Prepare data for clustering
cluster_data <- original_data %>%
  select(id, features.plot, avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = features.plot, values_from = avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  column_to_rownames("id")

# Perform hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist(cluster_data), method = "complete")
dend <- as.dendrogram(hc)

# Get the order of clusters from the dendrogram
cluster_order <- labels(dend)

# Reorder the data based on the dendrogram
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = cluster_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Convert dendrogram to a ggplot-friendly format
dend_data <- ggdendro::dendro_data(dend, type = "rectangle")

# Create the dendrogram plot
dendrogram_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = segment(dend_data),
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 70, 20)
  )

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white", "pink", "#8B1A1A")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y  = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Genes", size = "% Expressed", color = "Avg Expression")

# Combine dendrogram and dotplot
combined_plot <- grid.arrange(
  dendrogram_plot, dotplot, 
  ncol = 2, 
  widths = c(0.75, 4),
  top = textGrob("Pre-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
                 gp = gpar(fontsize = 30, fontface = "bold"))
)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_pre-imp_gene_expression_dotplot_with_dendrogram_cluster_ordered.png", 
       combined_plot, width = 20, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(combined_plot)
```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load the relabeled Seurat object
cells_subset <- cells.combined.p12

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
"Nanog", "Pou5f1", "Gsc", "Sox2", "Cdx2", "Elf5", "Gata3", "Tac2", "Muc16", "Ppbp", "Postn", "Pitx2", "Gata6", "Gata4", "Sox17")


# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells_subset, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 20) +  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkblue")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  labs(title = "In Vitro Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_in vitro_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(Idents(cells_subset)))
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Load the relabeled Seurat object
cells_subset <- cells.combined.p12

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
"Nanog", "Pou5f1", "Gsc", "Sox2", "Cdx2", "Elf5", "Gata3", "Tac2", "Muc16", "Ppbp", "Postn", "Pitx2", "Gata6", "Gata4", "Sox17")

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Define the custom order of clusters
desired_order <- rev(c("0", "9", "3","6", "1","4", "7","5", "8", "2"))

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Reorder the data and remove all NA values
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%  # Remove NA from both clusters and genes
  filter(id %in% desired_order) %>%  # Keep only the desired clusters
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = desired_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Create the dotplot manually
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 20)) +
  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkblue")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Pre-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types",
       size = "% Expressed",
       color = "Avg Expression")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_pre-imp_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes (excluding NA)
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6[!is.na(cells_subset$SCT_snn_res.0.6)]))

# Print unique values in the id column of the plotted data
print("Clusters in the plot:")
print(unique(reordered_data$id))
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)



# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
"Nanog", "Pou5f1", "Gsc", "Sox2", "Cdx2", "Elf5", "Gata3", "Tac2", "Muc16", "Ppbp", "Postn", "Pitx2", "Gata6", "Gata4", "Sox17")

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Prepare data for clustering
cluster_data <- original_data %>%
  select(id, features.plot, avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = features.plot, values_from = avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  column_to_rownames("id")

# Perform hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist(cluster_data), method = "complete")
dend <- as.dendrogram(hc)

# Get the order of clusters from the dendrogram
cluster_order <- labels(dend)

# Reorder the data based on the dendrogram
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = cluster_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Convert dendrogram to a ggplot-friendly format
dend_data <- ggdendro::dendro_data(dend, type = "rectangle")

# Create the dendrogram plot
dendrogram_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = segment(dend_data),
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 70, 20)
  )

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkblue")) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y  = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Genes", size = "% Expressed", color = "Avg Expression")

# Combine dendrogram and dotplot
combined_plot <- grid.arrange(
  dendrogram_plot, dotplot, 
  ncol = 2, 
  widths = c(0.75, 4),
  top = textGrob("In Vitro Gene Expression Dotplot",
                 gp = gpar(fontsize = 30, fontface = "bold"))
)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_in vitro_gene_expression_dotplot_with_dendrogram_cluster_ordered.png", 
       combined_plot, width = 20, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(combined_plot)
```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the genes of interest in the desired order
gene_sets <- c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Tfap2c","Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2","Cited1","Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9","Gbj5","Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Bmp2","Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1","Inhbb", "Pcdh12", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8","Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1","Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2", "Nanog", "Pou3f1", "Pou5f1","Klf4", "Otx2", "Sox2")

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Define the custom order of clusters
desired_order <- rev(c("0", "9", "3","5","6", "1","4", "7","8","2"))

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Reorder the data and remove all NA values
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%  # Remove NA from both clusters and genes
  filter(id %in% desired_order) %>%  # Keep only the desired clusters
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = desired_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Create the dotplot manually
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 20)) +
  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkgreen")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Post-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types",
       size = "% Expressed",
       color = "Avg Expression")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_Post-Implantation_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(Idents(cells_subset)))
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the genes of interest in the desired order
gene_sets <- c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Tfap2c", "Prl3d1", 
               "Prl3d3", "Prl2c2", "Cited1", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9", "Pcdh12", "Prl3b1", 
               "Prl7a2", "Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2", "Psmd12", "Gtf2b", "Slc16a1", 
               "Gjb5", "Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Bmp2", "Inhbb", "Tpbpa", "Cdx2", "Rora", "Mmp9", 
               "Plac8", "Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1", "Kdr", "Pecam1", 
               "Mest", "Emb", "Dlk1", "Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2", "Nanog", "Pou3f1", "Pou5f1", 
               "Klf4", "Otx2", "Sox2")


# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unlist(gene_sets, use.names = FALSE)

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Extract the original DotPlot data
original_data <- DotPlot(cells_subset, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6")$data

# Prepare data for clustering
cluster_data <- original_data %>%
  select(id, features.plot, avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = features.plot, values_from = avg.exp.scaled) %>%
  column_to_rownames("id")

# Perform hierarchical clustering
hc <- hclust(dist(cluster_data), method = "complete")
dend <- as.dendrogram(hc)

# Get the order of clusters from the dendrogram
cluster_order <- labels(dend)

# Reorder the data based on the dendrogram
reordered_data <- original_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(id) & !is.na(features.plot)) %>%
  mutate(
    id = factor(id, levels = cluster_order),
    features.plot = factor(features.plot, levels = genes_present)
  ) %>%
  arrange(id, features.plot)

# Convert dendrogram to a ggplot-friendly format
dend_data <- ggdendro::dendro_data(dend, type = "rectangle")

# Create the dendrogram plot
dendrogram_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_segment(data = segment(dend_data),
               aes(x = x, y = y, xend = xend, yend = yend)) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 5, 80, 20)
  )

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- ggplot(reordered_data, aes(x = features.plot, y = id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp, color = avg.exp.scaled)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0, 10)) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkgreen")) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y  = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 0)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Genes", size = "% Expressed", color = "Avg Expression")

# Combine dendrogram and dotplot
combined_plot <- grid.arrange(
  dendrogram_plot, dotplot, 
  ncol = 2, 
  widths = c(0.75, 4),
  top = textGrob("Pre-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
                 gp = gpar(fontsize = 30, fontface = "bold"))
)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_pre-imp_gene_expression_dotplot_with_dendrogram_cluster_ordered.png", 
       combined_plot, width = 20, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(combined_plot)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)

# Updated cell types and their marker genes
new_cell_types <- list(
  "EPC Bipotential Progenitor" = c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Sox2", "Tfap2c"),
  "EPC-derived S-TGC Progenitor" = c("Hand1", "Prl3d1", "Prl3d3", "Prl2c2", "Cited1"),
  "EPC-derived SpT Progenitor" = c("Ascl2", "Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9"),
  "Primary P-TGC" = c("Prl3d1", "Ugcg", "Hand1", "Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2", "Cited1", "Prl3d2"),
  "Secondary P-TGC" = c("Prl3d1", "Prl2c2", "Hand1", "Junb", "Xrcc4", "Psmd12", "Gtf2b", "Prl3d3", "Cited1"),
  "Secondary P-TGC Precursors" = c("Slc16a1", "Gjb5", "Ascl2"),
  "P-TGCs" = c("Prl3d1", "Hand1", "Prl2c2", "Cyp17a1", "Prl4a1"),
  "S-TGC" = c("Prl3b1", "Prl3d1", "Prl3d2", "Prl3d3", "Hand1"),
  "SpA-TGCs" = c("Prl3b1", "Prl7b1", "Prl7c1"),
  "SpT" = c("Ascl2", "Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Tpbpa", "Bmp2"),
  "SynTII Precursor" = c("Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1"),
  "Migratory Trophoblast" = c("Inhbb", "Fmnl1", "Pcdh12", "Tpbpa", "Cdx2", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8"),
  "EPC" = c("Pcdh12", "Prl3b1", "Prl7a2", "Cdh1", "Ascl2", "Gjb3", "Tfeb"),
  "SpA-TGC/Channel TGC/Canal TGC" = c("Prl3b1", "Ascl2", "Prl7b1", "Prl7c1"),
  "Endothelial" = c("Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1"),
  "Primitive endoderm" = c("S100g", "Fst"),
  "Yolk sac epithelial" = c("Afp", "Apoa1", "S100g", "Fabp3", "Spink1", "Ttr"),
  "Embryo stem cells/Epiblast" = c("Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2","Sox2", "Nanog", "Fgf4", "Klf4", "Pou5f1", "Esrrb","Utf1"),
  "Embryo stromal" = c("Mdk", "Tubb2b", "Nnat"),
  "Decidual stromal" = c("Prl8a2", "Cryab", "Col1a2", "Col3a1"),
  "Decidual pericytes" = c("Acta2", "Ifitm2"),
  "Decidual immune" = c("Ptprc", "Cd74", "Ramp2"),
  "Megakaryocytes" = c("Pf4"),
  "Erythrocytes" = c("Alas2", "Hba-a1", "Hba-a2"),
  "Hematopoietic" = c("Kit")
)

# Define the cell types in the order shown in the heatmap
cell_type_order <- rev(c(
```
