```{r}
"EPC Bipotential Progenitor","EPC-derived S-TGC Progenitor",   "EPC-derived SpT Progenitor",  "Primary P-TGC", "Secondary P-TGC",  "Secondary P-TGC Precursors", "P-TGCs", "S-TGC", "SpA-TGCs", "SpT", "SynTII Precursor", "Migratory Trophoblast", "EPC", "SpA-TGC/Channel TGC/Canal TGC", "Endothelial", "Primitive endoderm", "Yolk sac epithelial", "Embryo stem cells/Epiblast", "Embryo stromal",  "Decidual stromal", "Decidual pericytes", "Decidual immune", "Megakaryocytes", "Erythrocytes", "Hematopoietic"
))


# Create color palette based on the number of cell types in new_cell_types
n_new_cell_types <- length(new_cell_types)
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(rev(c("#4B0082", "#6A5ACD", "#4682B4", "#008080", "#20B2AA", 
                                    "#32CD32", "#FFD700", "#FF8C00", "#DC143C", "#8B0000")))(n_new_cell_types)

# Assign colors to cell types in the order specified by cell_type_order
cell_type_colors <- setNames(color_palette[1:length(cell_type_order)], cell_type_order)
# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unique(unlist(new_cell_types))

dotplot$data <- dotplot$data %>% mutate(avg.exp.scaled = pmax(avg.exp.scaled, 0))

# Create the dotplot with a visible legend and increased spacing between legend titles
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12,
                   features = all_genes,
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "navy"),
                   dot.scale = 12,
                   col.min = 0,
                   col.max = 12) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 18),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 40),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 28),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.8, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.margin = margin(t = 20, b = 20, l = 15, r = 10),
    legend.spacing = unit(2, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "cm"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, title.vjust = 3, barwidth = 3, barheight = 20),
    size = guide_legend(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, ncol = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Genes", y = "Clusters", size = "Percent Expressed", color = "Average Expression")

# Create the cell type legend
cell_type_legend <- ggplot(data.frame(y = seq_along(cell_type_order), x = 1, color = cell_type_order)) +
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, color = color), size = 8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cell_type_colors, name = "Cell Types", limits = cell_type_order) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = color), hjust = 0, size = 10) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.5, 10), clip = "off") +
  labs(y = NULL)

# Combine the dotplot and the cell type legend
combined_plot <- plot_grid(
  dotplot, 
  cell_type_legend, 
  ncol = 2, 
  rel_widths = c(5, 1.5), 
  align = "h", 
  axis = "tb"
)

# Save the combined plot
ggsave("SCT_snn_res.0.6_gene_dotplot_with_legends.png", plot = combined_plot, width = 40, height = 20, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(cowplot)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(Seurat)
# Updated cell types and their marker genes
new_cell_types <- list(
  "EPC Bipotential Progenitor" = c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Sox2", "Tfap2c"),
  "EPC-derived S-TGC Progenitor" = c("Hand1", "Prl3d1", "Prl3d3", "Prl2c2", "Cited1"),
  "EPC-derived SpT Progenitor" = c("Ascl2", "Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9"),
  "Primary P-TGC" = c("Prl3d1", "Ugcg", "Hand1", "Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2", "Cited1", "Prl3d2"),
  "Secondary P-TGC" = c("Prl3d1", "Prl2c2", "Hand1", "Junb", "Xrcc4", "Psmd12", "Gtf2b", "Prl3d3", "Cited1"),
  "Secondary P-TGC Precursors" = c("Slc16a1", "Gjb5", "Ascl2"),
  "P-TGCs" = c("Prl3d1", "Hand1", "Prl2c2", "Cyp17a1", "Prl4a1"),
  "S-TGC" = c("Prl3b1", "Prl3d1", "Prl3d2", "Prl3d3", "Hand1"),
  "SpA-TGCs" = c("Prl3b1", "Prl7b1", "Prl7c1"),
  "SpT" = c("Ascl2", "Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Tpbpa", "Bmp2"),
  "SynTII Precursor" = c("Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1"),
  "Migratory Trophoblast" = c("Inhbb", "Fmnl1", "Pcdh12", "Tpbpa", "Cdx2", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8"),
  "EPC" = c("Pcdh12", "Prl3b1", "Prl7a2", "Cdh1", "Ascl2", "Gjb3", "Tfeb"),
  "SpA-TGC/Channel TGC/Canal TGC" = c("Prl3b1", "Ascl2", "Prl7b1", "Prl7c1"),
  "Endothelial" = c("Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1"),
  "Primitive endoderm" = c("S100g", "Fst"),
  "Yolk sac epithelial" = c("Afp", "Apoa1", "S100g", "Fabp3", "Spink1", "Ttr"),
  "Embryo stem cells/Epiblast" = c("Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2","Sox2", "Nanog", "Fgf4", "Klf4", "Pou5f1", "Esrrb","Utf1"),
  "Embryo stromal" = c("Mdk", "Tubb2b", "Nnat"),
  "Decidual stromal" = c("Prl8a2", "Cryab", "Col1a2", "Col3a1"),
  "Decidual pericytes" = c("Acta2", "Ifitm2"),
  "Decidual immune" = c("Ptprc", "Cd74", "Ramp2"),
  "Megakaryocytes" = c("Pf4"),
  "Erythrocytes" = c("Alas2", "Hba-a1", "Hba-a2"),
  "Hematopoietic" = c("Kit")
)

# Define the cell types in the order shown in the heatmap
cell_type_order <- rev(c("EPC Bipotential Progenitor", "EPC-derived S-TGC Progenitor", 
                         "EPC-derived SpT Progenitor", "Primary P-TGC", "Secondary P-TGC", 
                         "Secondary P-TGC Precursors", "P-TGCs", "S-TGC", "SpA-TGCs", "SpT", 
                         "SynTII Precursor", "Migratory Trophoblast", "EPC", 
                         "SpA-TGC/Channel TGC/Canal TGC", "Endothelial", "Primitive endoderm", 
                         "Yolk sac epithelial", "Embryo stem cells/Epiblast", "Embryo stromal", 
                         "Decidual stromal", "Decidual pericytes", "Decidual immune", 
                         "Megakaryocytes", "Erythrocytes", "Hematopoietic"))

# Define the custom order of clusters
desired_order <- rev(c("0", "9", "3", "5","6", "1", "4", "7","8", "2"))

# Define the cell types in the order shown in the heatmap
cell_type_order <- rev(names(new_cell_types))

# Create color palette based on the number of cell types in new_cell_types
n_new_cell_types <- length(new_cell_types)
color_palette <- colorRampPalette(rev(c("#4B0082", "#6A5ACD", "#4682B4", "#008080", "#20B2AA",
                                        "#32CD32", "#FFD700", "#FF8C00", "#DC143C", "#8B0000")))(n_new_cell_types)

# Assign colors to cell types in the order specified by cell_type_order
cell_type_colors <- setNames(color_palette[1:length(cell_type_order)], cell_type_order)

# Flatten the list of gene sets while preserving order
all_genes <- unique(unlist(new_cell_types))

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12,
                   features = all_genes,
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   cols = c("lightgrey", "navy"),
                   dot.scale = 12,
                   col.min = 0,
                   col.max = 12)

# Filter out 0 values and set negative values to 0
dotplot$data <- dotplot$data %>% 
  filter(pct.exp > 0) %>%
  mutate(avg.exp.scaled = pmax(avg.exp.scaled, 0))

# Add the rest of the ggplot customization
dotplot <- dotplot +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = desired_order) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 18),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 40),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 30),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 28),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.8, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.box = "vertical",
    legend.margin = margin(t = 20, b = 20, l = 15, r = 10),
    legend.spacing = unit(2, "cm"),
    legend.key.height = unit(2, "cm"),
    plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, title.vjust = 3, barwidth = 3, barheight = 20),
    size = guide_legend(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5, ncol = 1)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Genes", y = "Clusters", size = "Percent Expressed", color = "Average Expression")

# Create a data frame mapping genes to cell types
gene_to_celltype <- data.frame(
  gene = unlist(new_cell_types),
  cell_type = rep(names(new_cell_types), sapply(new_cell_types, length))
) %>% 
  distinct(gene, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(cell_type = factor(cell_type, levels = cell_type_order)) %>%
  arrange(desc(cell_type))  # This line flips the order

# Create a new gene order based on the reversed cell type order
new_gene_order <- gene_to_celltype$gene

# Adjusting the color bar
color_bar <- ggplot(gene_to_celltype, aes(x = gene, y = 1, fill = cell_type)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cell_type_colors, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = new_gene_order) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = unit(c(0,0,0,0), "cm")
  )

# Combine the color bar and the dotplot
combined_plot <- plot_grid(
  color_bar, dotplot,
  ncol = 1,
  align = "v",
  rel_heights = c(0.05, 1)
)

# Adjusting the cell type legend to remove axis ticks and numbers
cell_type_legend <- ggplot(data.frame(y = seq_along(cell_type_order), x = 1, color = cell_type_order)) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = x, y = y, color = color), size = 8) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = cell_type_colors, name = "Cell Types", limits = cell_type_order, breaks = NULL) +
  theme_void() + 
  theme(legend.position = "none") + 
  geom_text(aes(x = 1.5, y = y, label = color), hjust = 0, size = 10) + 
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.5, 10), clip = "off") + 
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL) +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 1))

# Adjust the final_plot to accommodate the increased margins
final_plot <- plot_grid(
  combined_plot, 
  cell_type_legend,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(5, 1),
  align = "h",
  axis = "tb"
)

# Save the final plot
ggsave("SCT_snn_res.0.6_gene_dotplot_with_grouped_colorbar_and_legends_custom_order_no_zeros_flipped.png", 
       plot = final_plot, 
       width = 42,
       height = 24,
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
# Function to create and save feature plots
create_feature_plot <- function(seurat_obj, feature, filename) {
  if (feature %in% rownames(seurat_obj)) {
    p <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = feature, 
                     reduction = "umap", order = TRUE) +
      scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("lightgrey", "purple")) +
      ggtitle(feature) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))+
  coord_fixed()
    
    ggsave(filename, p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    return(p)
  } else {
    message(paste("Gene", feature, "not found in the dataset."))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Create individual feature plots
all_markers <- unique(unlist(new_cell_types))
feature_plots_list <- list()
for (marker in all_markers) {
  filename <- paste0("featureplot_", make.names(marker), ".png")
  p <- create_feature_plot(cells.combined.p12, marker, filename)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    feature_plots_list[[marker]] <- p
  }
}
```

```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#

```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)



# Define the genes of interest in the desired order
gene_sets <- c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Tfap2c","Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2","Cited1","Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9","Gbj5","Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Bmp2","Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1","Inhbb", "Pcdh12", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8","Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1","Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2", "Nanog", "Pou3f1", "Pou5f1","Klf4", "Otx2", "Sox2")



# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells_subset)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells_subset, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 20) +  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white","lightblue", "darkgreen")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) + 
  labs(title = "Post-Implantation Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Cell Types")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_Post-Implantation_gene_expression_dotplot_custom_order.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

# Print cluster sizes
print("Cluster sizes:")
print(table(Idents(cells_subset)))

```

```{r}
# Marker gene list 1, UMAPS, violin plot, dotplot, generates number and percent of cells expressing the gene condition and by cluster 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(cells.combined.p12) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes <- c("Gata3", "Pou5f1", "Nanog", "Cdx2", "Elf5", "Ascl2", "Postn", "Gata6", "Jup", "Gata2", 
                  "Gata4", "Klf4", "Krt18", "Sox2", "Btg2", "Tfap2c", "Gcm1", "Tpbpa", "Tfap2a", "Eomes", 
                  "Bmp2", "Wnt6", "Lrp2", "Pitx1", "Pitx2", "Krt7", "Epcam", "Cldn7", "T", "Afp", "Amn", 
                  "Ifitm3", "Ptn", "Twist2", "Isl1", "Tagln", "Acta2", "Fn1", "Foxf1", "Hand1", "Gtf2b", 
                  "Sox4", "Spib", "Nr2f6", "Fos", "Tcf4", "Cebpa", "Taf1", "Elf4", "Tead4", "Bmp4", 
                  "Bmp7", "Fgf4", "Sox17", "Dab2", "Acvrl1", "Acvr1", "Bmpr1b", "Bmpr2", "Psma5", "Psma1", 
                  "Lin28a", "Bcam", "Met", "Egfr", "Cyba", "Phlda2", "Elf3", "Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", 
                  "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1", "Krt19", "Timp1", "Phactr1", "Tnfaip2", "Ghrh", "Bhlhe40", 
                  "Mmp9", "Fosl1", "Slc16a3", "Gjb5", "Mt2", "Derl3", "Fgfbp1", "Pcdh12", "Adamts1", 
                  "Fmnl1", "Lgr5", "Msx2")

# Set up PDF device for saving plots
pdf("mTSCLC_markers.pdf")

for (i in marker_genes) {


  # Violin Plot by Cluster
  vp_cluster <- VlnPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                        features = i, 
                        pt.size = 0.2,
                        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",  # Assuming this is your clustering resolution
                        raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Violin Plot for", i, "by Cluster"))  # Title for the plot
  
  print(vp_cluster)

  # Feature Plot colored by clusters
  Idents(cells.combined.p12) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"
  fp <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap",
                    features = i, 
                    pt.size = 0.2, 
                    raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Feature Plot for", i))  # Title for the plot

  # Add cluster labels to the UMAP
  fp_with_labels <- LabelClusters(fp, id = "ident", size = 5)
  print(fp)
  print(fp_with_labels)
  
}


pdf("mTSCLC_markers_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster
dp <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
              features = marker_genes, 
              cols = c("blue", "red"), 
              dot.scale = 6) + 
  RotatedAxis() + 
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(), 
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(), 
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in marker_genes) {
  
  # Get gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  
  # Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
  conditions <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition)
  clusters <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)
  
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "mTSCLC_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "mTSCLC_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Marker gene list for 2C
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(cells.combined.p12) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes2c <- c("Zscan4b", "Zscan4c","Zscan4d","Zscan4e","Zscan4f","Tcstv1","Tcstv3", "Gm5662", "Gm2022","Gm4027", "Gm8994","Gm4340","Tdpoz1","Tdpoz3","Usp17lc","Usp17ld")

# Check which genes are actually present in the dataset
genes_present <- marker_genes2c[marker_genes2c %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]
genes_missing <- setdiff(marker_genes2c, genes_present)

if(length(genes_missing) > 0) {
  cat("The following genes are not present in the dataset:", paste(genes_missing, collapse=", "), "\n")
}

pdf("mTSCLC_2C_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster, using only the genes present in the dataset
dp <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12,
              features = genes_present,
              cols = c("blue", "red"),
              dot.scale = 6,
              scale.min = 0) +  # This line ensures no dot is shown for absent genes
  RotatedAxis() +
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(),
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(),
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Get gene expression data
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
conditions <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition)
clusters <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in genes_present) {
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "mTSCLC_2c_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "mTSCLC_2c_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}

labyrinthine_genes <- c("Gcm1", "Synb", "Cebpa", "Dlx3", "Cyp19a1")

spongiotrophoblast_genes <- c("Tpbpa", "Ascl2", "Prl8a8")

giant_cell_genes <- c("Prl3d1", "Prl3b1", "Prl2c2", "Hand1")

glycogen_cell_genes <- c("Pcdh12", "Gjb3")

endothelial_genes <- c("Cd34", "Pecam1")

endothelial_genes <- c("Cd34", "Pecam1")

hormone_growth_genes <- c("Psg18", "Psg19", "Psg21", "Igf2", "Vegfa")

transporter_genes <- c("Slc38a1", "Slc38a2", "Slc38a4", "Slc2a1", "Slc2a3")

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# Assuming your Seurat object is named 'cells.combined.p12'

# Function to create dot plot
create_dot_plot <- function(seurat_obj, gene_list, plot_title) {
  DotPlot(seurat_obj, features = gene_list, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
    ggtitle(plot_title)
}

# Create dot plots for each gene group
labyrinthine_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, labyrinthine_genes, "Labyrinthine Trophoblast Markers")
spongiotrophoblast_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, spongiotrophoblast_genes, "Spongiotrophoblast Markers")
giant_cell_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, giant_cell_genes, "Trophoblast Giant Cell Markers")
glycogen_cell_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, glycogen_cell_genes, "Glycogen Trophoblast Cell Markers")
endothelial_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, endothelial_genes, "Fetal Endothelial Cell Markers")
hormone_growth_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, hormone_growth_genes, "Placental Hormone and Growth Factor Genes")
transporter_plot <- create_dot_plot(cells.combined.p12, transporter_genes, "Placental Transporter Genes")

# Display the plots
print(labyrinthine_plot)
print(spongiotrophoblast_plot)
print(giant_cell_plot)
print(glycogen_cell_plot)
print(endothelial_plot)
print(hormone_growth_plot)
print(transporter_plot)

# Optionally, save the plots
ggsave("labyrinthine_markers.pdf", labyrinthine_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("spongiotrophoblast_markers.pdf", spongiotrophoblast_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("giant_cell_markers.pdf", giant_cell_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("glycogen_cell_markers.pdf", glycogen_cell_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("endothelial_markers.pdf", endothelial_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("hormone_growth_markers.pdf", hormone_growth_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
ggsave("transporter_markers.pdf", transporter_plot, width = 10, height = 6)
```


```{r}

# Marker gene list for totipotency

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(cells.combined.p12) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes_toti <- c("Dppa3","Dppa2","Dppa4","Pou5f1","Nanog", "Sox2","Klf4","Esrrb","Tbx3","Prdm14")

pdf("mTSCLC_markers_marker_genes_toti.pdf")

for (i in marker_genes_toti) {


  # Violin Plot by Cluster
  vp_cluster <- VlnPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                        features = i, 
                        pt.size = 0.2,
                        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",  # Assuming this is your clustering resolution
                        raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Violin Plot for", i, "by Cluster"))  # Title for the plot
  
  print(vp_cluster)

  # Feature Plot colored by clusters
  Idents(cells.combined.p12) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"
  fp <- FeaturePlot(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap",
                    features = i, 
                    pt.size = 0.2, 
                    raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Feature Plot for", i))  # Title for the plot

  # Add cluster labels to the UMAP
  fp_with_labels <- LabelClusters(fp, id = "ident", size = 5)
  print(fp)
  print(fp_with_labels)
  
}


pdf("mTSCLC_marker_genes_toti_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster
dp <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
              features = marker_genes_toti, 
              cols = c("blue", "red"), 
              dot.scale = 6) + 
  RotatedAxis() + 
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(), 
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(), 
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in marker_genes_toti) {
  
  # Get gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  
  # Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
  conditions <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition)
  clusters <- unique(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)
  
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(cells.combined.p12@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "mTSCLC_marker_genes_toti_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "mTSCLC_marker_genes_toti_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}

#keep in case i want to check later 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tfrc"
gene2 <- "Dio3"
gene3 <- "Hbegf"
gene4 <- "Glis1"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 &
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                                     levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]
# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis:", 
                     round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot as PNG
png_filename <- paste0("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_", gene4, "_Expression.png")
ggsave(filename = png_filename,
       plot = p, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 6, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300,
       device = "png")

# Print the plot
print(p)


# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "mTSCLC_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```
```{r}

```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define gene sets
gene_sets <- list(
  "pTE_specific" = c("Sox2", "Nodal", "Cripto", "Fgf4", "Pou5f1", "Nanog", "Klf4", "Zfp42"),
    "Shared_TE" = c("Cdx2", "Eomes", "Esrrb", "Elf5", "Fgfr2", "Bmp4", "Tfap2c", "Gata3", "Id2", "Tead4", "Yap1", "Dppa1", "Ets2", "Tcfap2a", "Gata2"),
  "mTE_specific" = c("Hand1", "Plac8", "Krt8", "Krt18", "Stra13")
)

# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))

# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]

# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",
                   dot.scale = 20) +  # Increase dot size
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("white", "pink", "#8B1A1A")) +  # White to pink to dark burgundy
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 40),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 40, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 40, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, face = "bold"),
    legend.key.size = unit(3, "cm"),  # Increase legend key size
    legend.position = "right"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Trophectoderm Gene Expression Dotplot",
       x = "Genes",
       y = "Clusters")

# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_TE_gene_expression_dotplot_large.png", dotplot, width = 30, height = 16, dpi = 300)

# Display the plot
print(dotplot)
```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define gene sets based on the image
gene_sets <- list(
  "LaTP" = c("Taf1", "Elf4"),
  "SynTII_precursor" = c("Gcm1", "Tbx3", "Cebpa", "Msx2"),
  "SynTI_precursor" = c("Dlx3", "Rb1", "Tead3", "Ovol2"),
  "Chorion Progenitors" = c("Eomes", "Sox2", "Fgfr2"),
  "Chorion" = c("Ascl2", "Esx1", "Gata2", "Irx4", "Id1", "Id3", "Rhox6"),
  "Bipoential EPC" = c("Ascl2", "Hand1", "Cdh5", "Entpd1", "Phlda2", "Chsy1"),
  "TGC Progenitors" = c("Ascl2", "Fosl1", "Adm"),
  "SpT-Gly" = c("Dlx3", "Car2", "Sct"),
  "Other_genes" = c("Foxo4", "Cdx1", "Hes7", "Hoxc13", "Glis1", "Pax2", "Pl1", "Pl2", "Pldf", "Csq", "Plac1", "Tpbpa", "Id2","Syna","Synb")
)
# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))
# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]
# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}
# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Dotplot")
# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_gene_expression_dotplot.png", dotplot, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# Display the plot
print(dotplot)
# Optional: Create a heatmap of the same genes
heatmap <- DoHeatmap(cells.combined.p12, features = genes_present, group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6") +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8))
# Save the heatmap
ggsave("mTSCLC_gene_expression_heatmap.png", heatmap, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 300)
# Display the heatmap
print(heatmap)
```
```{r}
# Define gene sets based on the image
gene_sets <- list(
  "Migratory Trophoblast" = c("Inhbb","Fmn1","Pcdh12","Tpbpa")
)
# Flatten the list of gene sets
all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_sets))
# Ensure all genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]
# Check if any genes are missing
missing_genes <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)
if (length(missing_genes) > 0) {
  warning(paste("The following genes are not in the dataset:", paste(missing_genes, collapse = ", ")))
}
# Create the dotplot
dotplot <- DotPlot(cells.combined.p12, 
                   features = genes_present, 
                   group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Gene Expression Dotplot")
# Save the plot
ggsave("mTSCLC_migratory troph_gene_expression_dotplot.png", dotplot, width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
# Display the plot
print(dotplot)

```


```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest for SynTII Precursors
gene1 <- "Gcm1"
gene2 <- "Tbx3"
gene3 <- "Cebpa"
gene4 <- "Msx2"

# Create a vector of all genes
all_genes <- c(gene1, gene2, gene3, gene4)

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("SynTII Precursors_Genes.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                              levels = c("No Expression", paste(paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) + 
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste("SynTII Progenitor Genes Expression\n", 
                     paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "\n", 
                     "Percent expressing:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave("UMAP_SynTII Precursors_Expression.png",  
       plot = p, width = 12, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found (if 'condition' column exists)
if ("condition" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(condition) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "SynTII PrecursorsGenes_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(conditions_with_expression)
}

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells (if this column exists)
if ("SCT_snn_res.0.6" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "SynTII PrecursorsGenes_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(clusters_with_expression)
}

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest for SynTI precursor
gene1 <- "Dlx3"
gene2 <- "Rb1"
gene3 <- "Tead3"
gene4 <- "Ovol2"  # Added fourth gene

# Create a vector of all genes
all_genes <- c(gene1, gene2, gene3, gene4)

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("SynTI_Precursor_Genes.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                              levels = c("No Expression", paste(paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) + 
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste("SynTI Precursor Genes Expression\n", 
                     paste(all_genes, collapse = "/"), "\n", 
                     "Percent expressing:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave("UMAP_SynTI_Precursor_Genes_Expression.png",  
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found (if 'condition' column exists)
if ("condition" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(condition) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "SynTI_Precursor_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(conditions_with_expression)
}

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells (if this column exists)
if ("SCT_snn_res.0.6" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "SynTI_Precursor_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(clusters_with_expression)
}

# Close the PDF
dev.off()
                
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the two genes of interest for SynTI precursor
gene1 <- "Mct1"
gene2 <- "Slc16a1"

# Create a vector of all genes
all_genes <- c(gene1, gene2)

# Check which genes are present in the dataset
genes_present <- all_genes[all_genes %in% rownames(cells.combined.p12)]
genes_missing <- setdiff(all_genes, genes_present)

if (length(genes_missing) > 0) {
  cat("The following genes are not present in the dataset:", paste(genes_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}

if (length(genes_present) == 0) {
  stop("None of the specified genes are present in the dataset. Cannot proceed with the analysis.")
}

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("SynTI_Precursor_Genes.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = cells.combined.p12, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all present genes
cells_expressing_all <- Reduce(`&`, lapply(genes_present, function(gene) gene_expression[gene, ] > 0))

# Identify cells expressing none of the present genes
cells_expressing_none <- Reduce(`&`, lapply(genes_present, function(gene) gene_expression[gene, ] == 0))

# Create a factor variable for labeling
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- "No Expression"
cells.combined.p12$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(paste(genes_present, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
cells.combined.p12$expression_status <- factor(cells.combined.p12$expression_status, 
                                               levels = c("No Expression", paste(paste(genes_present, collapse = "/"), "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(cells.combined.p12, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- cells.combined.p12$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) + 
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste("SynTI Precursor Genes Expression\n", 
                     paste(genes_present, collapse = "/"), "\n", 
                     "Percent expressing:", round(sum(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(cells.combined.p12) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave("UMAP_SynTI_Precursor_Genes_Expression.png",  
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- cells.combined.p12@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found (if 'condition' column exists)
if ("condition" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(condition) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))
  
  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "SynTI_Precursor_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(conditions_with_expression)
}

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells (if this column exists)
if ("SCT_snn_res.0.6" %in% colnames(expressing_cells_metadata)) {
  clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
    group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
    summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
    arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))
  
  # Save the result to a CSV file
  write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "SynTI_Precursor_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Print the result to the console for review
  print(clusters_with_expression)
}

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```


```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#

##

#
#
#
#
#

#
#
#

##
#
```
